targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE data->>'level'='ERROR' AND time>NOW()-INTERVAL '1 hour'
SELECT data->>'level' AS level,COUNT(*) AS count FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE time>NOW()-INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT time,tag,data->>'service' AS service,data->>'message' AS message FROM logs.fluentbit WHERE data->>'level' IN ('ERROR','CRITICAL') ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 20
